tagline: Build habits. Break limits. Every single day.
brand_brief: StreakForge speaks to driven self-improvers and productivity enthusiasts who want tangible proof of their daily consistency. The brand is focused, empowering, and quietly intense — like a personal coach who celebrates your wins without the fluff. It blends the precision of data with the warmth of personal growth.
logo_prompt: A minimal dark-mode logo mark for an app called StreakForge. Design a stylised flame composed of upward-curving streak lines or chain links, merging into a sleek abstract fire shape. The flame uses a gradient flowing from deep purple #7C3AED at the base to emerald green #10B981 at the tip, suggesting growth and momentum. The background is near-black #0A0A0F. The overall shape is compact, geometric, and modern — suitable for a mobile app icon. Style: flat vector with subtle glow effect, clean edges, no gradients on outer borders. The mood is focused, energetic, and minimal.
icon_style: Minimal geometric flame mark with purple-to-emerald gradient, subtle inner glow, flat vector style on dark background
